SEARCH
Package org.midheaven.lang

Interface Ordered<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the ordered type
All Superinterfaces:
Comparable<T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
Int, Rational
All Known Implementing Classes:
Angle, BigInt, Int32, Int64, IntAccumulator
public interface Ordered<T> extends Comparable<T>
Defines the contract for Ordered.
